Text.Page:
When Thulsa's forces hit us, many hid, many fought, and many died. But one of the scouts, {@Creature:227#1026$$Haruish}, seized the initiative and raced behind their lines.

We haven't heard from him since. I fear he's in trouble...or dead. Could you search for him?

The Mysterium appreciates your consideration.
(His courage didn't turn aside the blade that killed him.)<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"I'll return your effects."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>
(A quick search turns up a letter.)
Brave lad. I wish I'd known him better.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Talk to these soldiers."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

True enough. I'll do that.

I'll also get this letter to his family. I'm sure they'd want it.
